value.//: Part C — service-to-service access. Toggle each grant with 'enabled' and change the role level with 'roleDefinitionId'. Names are for readability only.
value.//foundryProjectToSearch: Foundry project identity -> AI Search. Default: Search Index Data Contributor (read + write index data) so the Foundry IQ knowledge base can index the data and the marketing agent can query it. Use Search Index Data Reader (1407120a-92aa-4202-b7e9-c0e197c71c8f) for query-only.
value.//foundryAccountToAcr: Foundry account identity -> Container Registry. Default: AcrPull (pull-only) so hosted agents can pull their images.
value.//containerAppsToAcr: Container Apps workload identity -> Container Registry. Default: AcrPull so the MCP servers and chat app can pull their images.
value.//containerAppsToCosmos: Container Apps workload identity -> Cosmos DB (data plane). Default: built-in Cosmos DB Data Contributor (read/write data). cosmosSqlRoleDefinitionId is a Cosmos SQL role id: 00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001 = Data Reader, ...0002 = Data Contributor.
